title: vred's Weaponry
description: A data-pack that adds a lot of exciting weapons with new materials and a brand new crafting system!
body:
# MOD REQUIRED: CIT RESEWN/FORGE - OPTIFINE IS CURRENTLY NOT SUPPORTED!
This is vred's Weaponry. This datapack adds a lot of weapons, a new crafting and upgrading system and also custom materials you can find around the world or craft! This project adds content from Soul Knight, Jujutsu Kaisen (JJK)and much more!

All weapons are craftable, datapack is mostly survival friendly. Btw this datapack has compatibility with Continuity for glowing textures on all weapons!

For the recipes, new updates, sneak peeks and more, join the discord server!
https://discord.gg/7M8shcNXWd


<details>
<summary>Helpful commands:</summary>

## NO COOLDOWN MODE
Use this command to enable/disable no cooldown mode:
```
/function vred:toggle_op
```

## SINGLE CRAFTING
Use this command to enable/disable single time crafting for weapons (only very rare and higher tier):
```
/function vred:single_crafting
```

## GET ALL THE WEAPONS
Use this command to spawn shulker box with all the weapons:
```
/function vred:vred_weapons
```

## GET ALL THE MATERIALS
Use this command to spawn shulker box with all the materials (x64 of each one):
```
/function vred:vred_materials
```


</details>



<details>
<summary>How to use pedestals? (You need them for crafting weapons)</summary>
